nasb.text: Remember this, O Lord, that the enemy has reviled, And a foolish people has spurned Your name.

esv.text: Remember this, O Lord, how the enemy scoffs, and a foolish people reviles your name.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！仇敵辱罵你， 愚頑人褻瀆你的名， 求你記念這事。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 求你记住敌人对你的嘲笑和愚妄人对你的亵渎。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，求你记住这事： 仇敌辱骂你，愚顽的子民藐视你的名！
